name: GCP Database Migration
description: Migration from Airtable to Google Cloud Platform (Cloud SQL via Cloud Run API). Phase 1 (data migration) and Airtable disconnection COMPLETE. Phase 2 (business logic microservices), Phase 3 (Next.js frontend) COMPLETE. Phase 4 (platform services) COMPLETE — all 7 GCP services provisioned and deployed.
milestones_completed: Phase 1: Cloud SQL migration (24,826 records)
Cloud Run API (lmdr-api) deployed (revision lmdr-api-00008-8nm)
airtableClient.jsw DELETED
dataAccess.jsw rewritten for Cloud Run + Wix only
AIRTABLE_PAT secret deleted from Wix
configData.js usesAirtable() stubbed to return false
5 backend services migrated from airtableClient to dataAccess
20 seed files and 20 connection test files deleted
101 regression tests passing
Phase 4: search extensions installed (pg_trgm, postgis, pgvector, unaccent)
Phase 4: tsvector columns + triggers on carriers (23,337) and driver_profiles (11)
Phase 4: document_embeddings table with vector(1536)
Phase 4: search, files, jobs routes deployed to Cloud Run (revision lmdr-api-00013-gks)
Phase 4: 4 GCS buckets created (driver-documents, carrier-assets, static-assets, ai-training-data)
Phase 4: 5 Pub/Sub topics + 5 DLQs + 10 subscriptions
Phase 4: 6 Cloud Scheduler jobs (compliance, board, earnings, invoices, rtdb, rag)
Phase 4: 13 service accounts with least-privilege IAM (audit passed)
Phase 4: Firebase auth provisioner SA created
Phase 4: Cloud SQL instance attached to Cloud Run
Phase 4: phase4-smoke.test.js (11 test cases)

observability_bigquery.notes: BigQuery streaming to ldmr-velocitymatch.lmdr_analytics; x-trace-id on all responses

firebase_auth.notes: SA created + roles granted; auth provisioner function written but not yet deployed to Cloud Functions; manual steps needed in Firebase Console (enable providers)

cloud_storage.notes: 4 GCS buckets with CORS + lifecycle; signed-URL endpoint live at /v1/files/signed-url

pubsub.notes: 5 topics + 5 DLQ topics + 10 subscriptions with dead-letter policy (max 5 attempts)

firebase_rtdb.notes: rtdb-cleanup job wired as placeholder; RTDB not yet needed

cloud_scheduler.notes: 6 jobs with OIDC auth targeting lmdr-api; scheduler SA has run.invoker scoped to lmdr-api only

iam_service_accounts.notes: 13 SAs created; IAM audit passed (no roles/owner or roles/editor)

monitoring.notes: 5 alert policies (error rate, latency p95, SQL connections + 2 pre-existing); notification channel LastMile@velocitymatch.io; uptime check on /health every 5min
